properties.doc: Whether the operation applies to data-plane. This is "true" for data-plane operations and "false" for Azure Resource Manager/control-plane operations.

properties.name: description
properties.doc: The short, localized friendly description of the operation; suitable for tool tips and detailed views.

properties.name: origin
properties.doc: The intended executor of the operation; as in Resource Based Access Control (RBAC) and audit logs UX. Default value is "user,system"

models.name: CosmosDBForPostgreSqlCluster
models.doc: Represents a cluster.

baseModel.name: TrackedResource
baseModel.doc: The resource model definition for an Azure Resource Manager tracked top level resource which has 'tags' and a 'location'

baseModel.name: Resource
baseModel.doc: Common fields that are returned in the response for all Azure Resource Manager resources

properties.name: id
properties.doc: Fully qualified resource ID for the resource. Ex - /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/{resourceProviderNamespace}/{resourceType}/{resourceName}

properties.name: name
properties.doc: The name of the resource

properties.name: type
properties.doc: The type of the resource. E.g. "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines" or "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts"

properties.name: systemData
properties.doc: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

type.name: SystemData
type.doc: Metadata pertaining to creation and last modification of the resource.

properties.name: createdBy
properties.doc: The identity that created the resource.

properties.name: createdByType
properties.doc: The type of identity that created the resource.

properties.name: createdAt
properties.doc: The timestamp of resource creation (UTC).

properties.name: lastModifiedBy
properties.doc: The identity that last modified the resource.

properties.name: lastModifiedByType
properties.doc: The type of identity that last modified the resource.

properties.name: lastModifiedAt
properties.doc: The timestamp of resource last modification (UTC)

properties.name: tags
properties.doc: Resource tags.

properties.name: location
properties.doc: The geo-location where the resource lives

properties.name: properties
properties.doc: Properties of the cluster.

type.name: ClusterProperties
type.doc: Properties of the cluster.

properties.name: aadAuthEnabled
properties.doc: Indicates whether the cluster was created using AAD authentication.

properties.name: administratorLogin
properties.doc: The administrator's login name of the servers in the cluster.

properties.name: administratorLoginPassword
properties.doc: The password of the administrator login. Required for creation.

properties.name: dataEncryption
properties.doc: The data encryption properties of a cluster.

type.name: DataEncryption
type.doc: The data encryption properties of a cluster.

properties.name: primaryKeyUri
properties.doc: URI for the key in keyvault for data encryption of the primary server.

properties.name: primaryUserAssignedIdentityId
properties.doc: Resource Id for the User assigned identity to be used for data encryption of the primary server.

properties.name: provisioningState
properties.doc: Provisioning state of the cluster

properties.name: state
properties.doc: A state of a cluster/server that is visible to user.

properties.name: postgresqlVersion
properties.doc: The major PostgreSQL version on all cluster servers.

properties.name: citusVersion
properties.doc: The Citus extension version on all cluster servers.

properties.name: maintenanceWindow
properties.doc: Maintenance window of a cluster.

type.name: CosmosDBForPostgreSqlMaintenanceWindow
type.doc: Schedule settings for regular cluster updates.

properties.name: customWindow
properties.doc: Indicates whether custom maintenance window is enabled or not.

properties.name: startHour
properties.doc: Start hour within preferred day of the week for maintenance window.

properties.name: startMinute
properties.doc: Start minute within the start hour for maintenance window.

properties.name: dayOfWeek
properties.doc: Preferred day of the week for maintenance window.

properties.name: preferredPrimaryZone
properties.doc: Preferred primary availability zone (AZ) for all cluster servers.

properties.name: IsShardsOnCoordinatorEnabled
properties.doc: If distributed tables are placed on coordinator or not. Should be set to 'true' on single node clusters. Requires shard rebalancing after value is changed.

properties.name: IsHAEnabled
properties.doc: If high availability (HA) is enabled or not for the cluster.

properties.name: coordinatorServerEdition
properties.doc: The edition of a coordinator server (default: GeneralPurpose). Required for creation.

properties.name: coordinatorStorageQuotaInMb
properties.doc: The storage of a server in MB. Required for creation. See https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/cosmos-db/postgresql/resources-compute for more information.

properties.name: coordinatorVCores
properties.doc: The vCores count of a server (max: 96). Required for creation. See https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/cosmos-db/postgresql/resources-compute for more information.

properties.name: IsCoordinatorPublicIPAccessEnabled
properties.doc: If public access is enabled on coordinator.

properties.name: nodeServerEdition
properties.doc: The edition of a node server (default: MemoryOptimized).

properties.name: nodeCount
properties.doc: Worker node count of the cluster. When node count is 0, it represents a single node configuration with the ability to create distributed tables on that node. 2 or more worker nodes represent multi-node configuration. Node count value cannot be 1. Required for creation.

properties.name: nodeStorageQuotaInMb
properties.doc: The storage in MB on each worker node. See https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/cosmos-db/postgresql/resources-compute for more information.

properties.name: nodeVCores
properties.doc: The compute in vCores on each worker node (max: 104). See https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/cosmos-db/postgresql/resources-compute for more information.

properties.name: IsNodePublicIPAccessEnabled
properties.doc: If public access is enabled on worker nodes.

properties.name: serverNames
properties.doc: The list of server names in the cluster

valueType.name: CosmosDBForPostgreSqlServerNameItem
valueType.doc: The name object for a server.

properties.name: name
properties.doc: The name of a server.

properties.name: fullyQualifiedDomainName
properties.doc: The fully qualified domain name of a server.

properties.name: sourceResourceId
properties.doc: The resource id of source cluster for read replica clusters.

properties.name: sourceLocation
properties.doc: The Azure region of source cluster for read replica clusters.

properties.name: passwordEnabled
properties.doc: Indicates whether the cluster was created with a password or using AAD authentication.

properties.name: pointInTimeUTC
properties.doc: Date and time in UTC (ISO8601 format) for cluster restore.

properties.name: readReplicas
properties.doc: The array of read replica clusters.

properties.name: earliestRestoreTime
properties.doc: The earliest restore point time (ISO8601 format) for the cluster.

properties.name: privateEndpointConnections
properties.doc: The private endpoint connections for a cluster.

Deletes an existing cluster.

Return types of metrics that are available for databases

methods.doc: Checks availability of a cluster name. Cluster names should be globally unique; at least 3 characters and at most 40 characters long; they must only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens; and must not start or end with a hyphen.
